productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Red Printed Top
description: Composition Red printed V-neck top made of blended cotton fabric, has a short placket, sequin detailing along the neckline, flaring pin tucks from the waist, short puff sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The inspiration for this top from mother earth is the retro-esque fusion of the ethnic with smart workwear. This piece epitomizes how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Mother Earth uses hand processed fabrics including natural and Azo free dyes. Woven with slub yarns for an authentic vintage feel. Those interested in colourblocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others, who want to keep their look classic and chic, can pair this with jeggings and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
